summary: Frontend brand logo testing completed successfully. All official brand logos render correctly on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports: MapPin app logo in header/footer, Visa/Mastercard/Amex payment cards with correct colors, Google Play and App Store badges with official styling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All brand logos verified and working: 1) Header logo uses MapPin lucide-react icon with cyan-to-green gradient (from-cyan-400 to-green-400), 2) Footer logo same MapPin icon with gradient, 3) Payment cards in Pricing section: Visa (#1434CB blue), Mastercard (#EB001B red + #F79E1B orange circles), Amex (#006FCF blue bg with white text), 4) Download section: Google Play badge with 4-color triangle SVG (#4285F4 blue, #FBBC04 yellow, #EA4335 red, #34A853 green) and 'GET IT ON' text on black bg, App Store badge with white Apple SVG and 'Download on the' text on black bg, 5) All logos render correctly on mobile viewport (390px width).

tested_features.details: MapPin lucide-react icon with cyan-to-green gradient background, visible on desktop and mobile
MapPin icon with gradient background visible in footer section on all viewports
Blue (#1434CB) Visa SVG logo on white background, dimensions 96x40px
Red (#EB001B) and orange (#F79E1B) overlapping circles SVG on white background, dimensions 88x48px
White 'AMERICAN EXPRESS' text on blue (#006FCF) background, dimensions 95x44px
Colorful triangle SVG logo with all 4 Google colors (blue, yellow, red, green), 'GET IT ON' text on black background
White Apple SVG logo, 'Download on the' text on black background
Download APK button visible with gradient styling
All logos render correctly on mobile: header (181x40), payment cards visible, store badges (171x79 each), footer logo (48x48)
